subject: Replace aai server cert with new SAN cert
commit_message:
Replace aai server cert with new SAN cert

Issue-ID: AAI-1132
Change-Id: Iddb589977f5069de5b3a21bad7e84711cdd6e5d8
Signed-off-by: Jimmy Forsyth <jf2512@att.com>
